channel.title: pkg on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in pkg on IT notes

item.title: pkg -o OSVERSION
item.description: When updating if get something like this: pkg: Newer FreeBSD version for package jsoncpp: - package: 1101503 - running kernel: 1100506 Try uname -KU to get the version, and then: pkg -o OSVERSION=1100506 update -f pkg -o OSVERSION=1100506 upgrade
